languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

languages.text: "Ты абсолютно справедлив в своем требовании. Мы с Нунциусом давно обсуждаем необходимость более полного присутствия коллег со Стигии VIII в Просторе Коронус. Возможно, покровительство Вольного Торговца могло бы этому поспособствовать".

"Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

languages.text: 「貴方の要求は全く正当です。ヌンシウスと私は、スタイギウス8世がコロナス・エクスパンスに大きな存在感を示す必要性について、長い間議論してきました。もしかすると、ローグ・トレーダーの支援によって、この実現が図れるかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方の要求は全く正当です。ヌンシウスと私は、スタイギウス8世がコロナス・エクスパンションに大きな存在感を示す必要性について、長い間議論してきました。もしかすると、ローグ・トレーダーの支援によって、この実現が図れるかもしれません。」

languages.text: « Votre requête est entièrement justifiée. Nuncius et moi en avons longuement discuté, et nous pensons qu'il est nécessaire que Stygies VIII renforce sa présence dans les Étendues de Koronus. Nous y parviendrons peut-être avec le concours {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

traits.locale_text: « Votre requête est entièrement justifiée. Nuncius et moi en avons longuement discuté, et nous pensons qu'il est nécessaire que Stygies VIII renforce sa présence dans les Étendues de Koronus. Nous y parviendrons peut-être avec le concours {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Eure Forderung ist absolut gerechtfertigt. Nuncius und ich haben lange darüber gesprochen, dass Stygies VIII in der Koronus-Ausdehnung eine wichtigere Rolle spielen sollte. Vielleicht bringt uns die Unterstützung {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} diesem Ziel ja näher."
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Forderung ist absolut gerechtfertigt. Nuncius und ich haben lange darüber gesprochen, dass Stygies VIII in der Koronus-Ausdehnung eine wichtigere Rolle spielen sollte. Vielleicht bringt uns die Unterstützung {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} diesem Ziel ja näher."

languages.text: "Bu talep son derece haklı. Nuncius ve ben uzun zamandır Stygies VIII'in Koronus Enginliği'nde daha büyük bir varlık göstermesi gerektiğini tartışıyorduk. Belki de Hür Tacir'in himayesi bunu gerçekleştirebilir."
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

traits.locale_text: "Bu talep son derece haklı. Nuncius ve ben uzun zamandır Stygies VIII'in Koronus Enginliği'nde daha büyük bir varlık göstermesi gerektiğini tartışıyorduk. Belki de Hür Tacir'in himayesi bunu gerçekleştirebilir."

languages.text: «Su petición está absolutamente justificada. Nuncius y yo hemos discutido largo y tendido sobre la necesidad de aumentar la presencia de Stygies VIII en la Extensión de Koronus. Quizá el patrocinio {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente baste para conseguirlo».
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."

traits.locale_text: «Su petición está absolutamente justificada. Nuncius y yo hemos discutido largo y tendido sobre la necesidad de aumentar la presencia de Stygies VIII en la Extensión de Koronus. Quizá el patrocinio {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente baste para conseguirlo».

languages.text: “你的要求完全合理。努恩修斯与我早就在讨论，斯泰吉斯8号有必要在科罗努斯扩区拓展势力范围。或许，借由这位行商浪人的庇护，可以促成此事。”
languages.original_text: "Your demand is absolutely justified. Nuncius and I have long discussed the need for Stygies VIII to establish a greater presence in the Koronus Expanse. Perhaps the patronage of the Rogue Trader could bring this about."
